productDisplayName: Paris Hilton Women Tease Woman Eau De Parfum 100Ml
description: Style Note Tease is the tenth edition in paris hilton&rsquo s perfume collection. What separates it from the crowd is the composition based on Hilton&rsquo s fascination with Marilyn Monroe. Tease is created in cooperation with perfumer Steve De Mercado of Fragrance Resources and constructed as chypre-floral-oriental.Product DetailsTease by Paris Hilton is a compex experience, a very select composition of fuji apple, white peach, bergamot, white flowers, amber, blond wood and hot sandCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesQuantity100 ml
